description: The test `sign_verify_with_local_signing_backend` (lib.rs line 406) writes to `std::env::temp_dir().join("secretx-sig-test-ed25519.der")` — a fixed, process-global path. When `cargo test` runs tests with multiple threads (the default), two test threads can simultaneously write to and read from this file, causing flaky failures or silent data corruption between them. Additionally, `std::fs::remove_file` is called at the end without a RAII guard, so any panic between write and remove leaves the file on disk, which can affect subsequent runs. Fix: use `tempfile::NamedTempFile` (add `tempfile` as a dev-dependency) or generate a unique filename with a random suffix.
title: Integration test uses fixed temp filename, racy under parallel test
